allow: PowerShell(try { Rename-Item -Path "build" -NewName \("build-old-" + [int][double]::Parse\(\(Get-Date -UFormat %s\)\)\) -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "renamed" } catch { Write-Output \("failed: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell($buildPath = "C:\\Users\\adria\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Github repos\\ruma\\build"; if \(Test-Path $buildPath\) { \(Get-Item $buildPath -Force\).Attributes; Get-ChildItem $buildPath -Recurse -Force | Select-Object -First 5 FullName, Attributes | Format-Table -AutoSize })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\adria\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Github repos\\ruma\\build\\client" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Attributes | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---"; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -in @\('OneDrive','MsMpEng','SearchProtocolHost','SearchIndexer','explorer'\) } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\adria\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Github repos\\ruma\\build"; attrib -r -s -h "$path" /S /D 2>&1 | Out-Null; cmd /c "rmdir /s /q `"$path`"" 2>&1 | Out-Null; if \(Test-Path $path\) { Write-Output "still exists" } else { Write-Output "removed" })

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -in @\('node','wrangler','workerd','vite'\) } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "OneDrive status:"; Get-Process OneDrive -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -in @\('node','workerd','wrangler'\) } | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -in @\('node','workerd','wrangler'\) } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "remaining processes \(empty = all killed\)")
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -in @\('node','workerd','wrangler'\) } | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Output "killed dev processes")
